news.headline: US sprinter Noah Lyles sets world best 150m time at Golden Spike meet
news.summary: Lyles clocks 14.67 seconds, edges Dambile of South Africa for gold while Australian teenager Gout Gout finishes third.

news.headline: France puts 14 on trial over deadliest Channel migrant crossing disaster
news.summary: Fourteen people will stand trial in France over the deaths of 31 migrants in the deadliest recorded small-boat disaster in the English Channel, prosecutors said on Tuesday. The defendants are accused of links to people-smuggling networks involved in the November 2021 sinking, which left four others

news.headline: World Cup 2026: French supporters go wild after victory against Senegal
news.summary: After a slow and uninspired start, France finally managed to kick off their 2026 World Cup with a win, defeating Senegal 3-1.
